topStories.description: In a message to UK and other nations, Trump said that countries will have to start learning how to fight for themselves.

dailyNews.description: The latest addition to the landmarks renamed after US President Donald Trump is Palm Beach International Airport. On Monday, Florida Governor Ron DeSantis signed a bill to rename the airport. Here's a list of things that have been renamed since Trump came back to office.

dailyNews.title: BJP's 4th Bengal list: Union minister's wife, ex-Congress leader among 13 candidates
dailyNews.description: With this, BJP has named 287 candidates for the race to the 294-member state assembly

dailyNews.title: Oil shock: US fuel prices soar over $4 per gallon — highest since 2022 as conflict with Iran continues
dailyNews.description: Since the US and Israel carried out strikes on Iran in late February, petrol prices have jumped by more than 30%, AAA data showed. Meanwhile, diesel prices crossed $5 per gallon mark on March 17 with the current rates over 40% higher than they were before the conflict - reports state

dailyNews.title: NASA Artemis II launch LIVE Updates: Countdown begins, Canadian astronaut calls mission ‘a huge deal’
dailyNews.description: NASA Artemis II launch LIVE Updates: The NASA and the United States are making a strong comeback in their lunar exploration programme — nearly 50 years after the Apollo missions. Stay tuned to this LIVE blog for all the latest updates on Artemis II mission.

dailyNews.title: US defence secretary says next few days in Iran war will be ‘decisive’
dailyNews.description: US Defence Secretary Pete Hegseth warned the coming days of the war with Iran will be ‘decisive.'

dailyNews.title: Google is now letting users in the US change their Gmail address
dailyNews.description: Users will be able to change their username only once every 12 months. Plus, they won't be able to delete their new email address for that period of time.

dailyNews.title: ‘This is not solely an American matter’: Ro Khanna calls on King Charles to meet Epstein survivors during US visit
dailyNews.description: Democratic Congressman Ro Khanna urged King Charles III to meet the survivors of the late convicted sex offender Jeffrey Epstein during his possible visit to the US. Khanna, in his letter, mentioned that Epstein's network was not limited to the US and his social circle was spread across the UK.

dailyNews.title: Artemis 2: Houston, we have a new moon mission — The ‘Twin Sister of Apollo’
dailyNews.description: Before reaching Mars, NASA wants a pit stop at the darker, colder side of the Moon — “the lunar South Pole” — and the Artemis program is a path towards that goal. Here's A to Z of the United States latest moon mission.

dailyNews.title: Kissing a woman's hand can be sexual assault, Spanish court finds
dailyNews.description: The Supreme Court found that a man had done more than harass a woman by kissing her hand as there had been "a clear sexual component" to his behaviour.

dailyNews.title: Bulls to return after March massacre? Elara sees limited downside for Nifty after 11% crash amid Iran-US war
dailyNews.description: After an 11% March crash driven by the escalating Iran–US conflict, Elara Securities says the Nifty may have limited downside ahead. Historical data shows conflicts typically cap drawdowns near 10%, and with valuations now 7% below long-term averages, the brokerage expects a potential rebound as risks gradually ease.

dailyNews.title: Modi inaugurates semiconductor manufacturing facility in Gujarat’s Sanand
dailyNews.description: Prime Minister Narendra Modi said the modules manufactured in Sanand will reach American companies and from there power the entire world

dailyNews.title: Italy denies the US military use of its air bases to attack Iran
dailyNews.description: Italian press reports that the government has refuse to authorise US to land bombers at a base in Sicily

dailyNews.title: Behold NFL 2030s: Playing 18-game regular season, every team visits overseas, two preseason games
dailyNews.description: Patriots owner Robert Kraft and Colts owner Carlie Irsay-Gordon are among NFL owners who see 18-game regular season with two preseason games in league’s future.

dailyNews.title: Dems who ran on affordability now face backlash as costs climb in NY, Virginia
dailyNews.description: Democrats Mamdani and Spanberger face voter backlash over rising costs despite affordability pledges, raising political stakes for the party ahead of the midterms.

dailyNews.title: New York traveler goes viral after backing ICE agents at airport
dailyNews.description: The Fox News Lifestyle Newsletter brings you trending stories on family, travel, food, neighbors helping neighbors, pets, autos, military veterans, heroes, faith and American values.

dailyNews.title: States' top cops gang up on Letitia James in crusade with potential nationwide consequences
dailyNews.description: Montana AG Austin Knudsen accused New York AG Letitia James of pushing an activist agenda, as Republican states challenge her state's effort to expand gun maker liability.

dailyNews.title: Howie Mandel clash highlights Kelly Ripa’s history of cringeworthy on-air exchanges
dailyNews.description: From Howie Mandel's birthday tension to Ryan Seacrest's viral chair fall, Kelly Ripa's most awkward and cringeworthy moments on "Live" are unforgettable.

dailyNews.title: Browns owner gives optimistic outlook for injury-riddled Deshaun Watson
dailyNews.description: Cleveland Browns team owner Jimmy Haslam expressed a sunny outlook for quarterback Deshaun Watson despite his injury-riddled tenure with the team.

topStories.description: New renderings of President Donald Trump's proposed Miami presidential library reveal a glass waterfront skyscraper with gold lettering, a Trump statue and Oval Office replicas.

topStories.title: Scoop: House Speaker Mike Johnson's allies unleash $10M campaign to spotlight Trump tax cuts
topStories.description: The American Action Network says it's launching a $10 million ad blitz through Tax Day to promote the Working Families Tax Cuts Act across 37 congressional districts.

topStories.title: Trump admin official shreds NY Times over multiple corrections to report on Silicon Valley initiative
topStories.description: Jacob Helberg detailed the Trump administration’s "Pax Silica" investor consortium after The New York Times issued corrections clarifying funding figures and his remarks.

topStories.title: Trump Faces a Decision on Whether to Start a Ground War in Iran
topStories.description: The president wants a negotiation, but the Iranians say they are refusing until a cease-fire is declared. And while Marines and the 82nd Airborne Division offer new leverage, the risks escalate quickly.

topStories.title: U.S. Gas Prices Hit $4 a Gallon on Average, a ‘Headache’ for Drivers and Trump
topStories.description: A month since the first U.S.-Israeli attacks and Iran’s response effectively shut off Persian Gulf oil, drivers are paying significantly more to fill up.

topStories.title: Will $4 Gas Hurt Trump’s Approval Ratings? Here’s What History Shows.
topStories.description: Presidents since at least the Carter administration have seen their approval ratings tied to gas prices. But there are signs the correlation may be weakening.

topStories.description: Plus, a three-minute, multimillion-dollar art heist.

topStories.description: No president since the Apollo era has pushed harder to return to the moon than President Trump. But he wants a space achievement that is about “more than getting rocks this time.”

dailyNews.title: After Months of Threats, Trump Softens His Stance on Blocking Oil to Cuba
dailyNews.description: The White House press secretary said the United States would evaluate oil shipments to Cuba on a “case-by-case basis,” after a Russian tanker full of crude reached the island.

dailyNews.title: Edward Russo Says Donald Trump Is an ‘Environmental Hero’
dailyNews.description: Edward Russo, the only member of a White House task force, thinks the president doesn’t get enough credit for conservation at his golf courses, among other things.

dailyNews.title: Trump Reveals New Look for White House Ballroom After Times Article
dailyNews.description: Architects and preservation organizations have warned that little scrutiny has been given to the project’s design plans.

dailyNews.title: DeSantis Signs Bill to Rename Florida Airport for Trump
dailyNews.description: The airport near West Palm Beach will be rebranded the President Donald J. Trump International Airport on July 1, if approved by the Federal Aviation Administration.

dailyNews.title: The People Trump Pardoned Are on a Crime Spree
dailyNews.description: The president and the Republican Party deserve to pay a political price for the pardons.

dailyNews.title: Medicaid cuts threaten hundreds of hospitals, new report finds
dailyNews.description: More than 400 hospitals across the United States are at high risk of closing or cutting services because of the Medicaid cuts in President Donald Trump’s “big, beautiful bill,” according to an analysis from the progressive watchdog group Public Citizen

dailyNews.title: WH pressed on Trump’s threat to hit civilian infrastructure in Iran
dailyNews.description: In a post on Truth Social, President Donald Trump threatened the destruction of Iran's civilian energy and water infrastructure if a deal to end the war and reopen the crucial Strait of Hormuz is not reached soon. NBC News' Garrett Haake questioned White House press secretary Karoline Leavitt about the president's threat.

dailyNews.title: Trump says he's not ready "quite yet" to leave it to allies to reopen Strait of Hormuz
dailyNews.description: President Trump told CBS News that he is not ready "quite yet" to abandon efforts to force Iran to reopen the Strait of Hormuz, despite a Truth Social post suggesting allies need to do it themselves.

dailyNews.title: Gas price rises as Trump mulls dropping bid to reopen Strait of Hormuz
dailyNews.description: Trump indicates he could abandon efforts to force Iran to reopen the Strait of Hormuz as the war pushes U.S. gas prices over the $4 mark.

dailyNews.title: Trump posts video of massive bombing in Iran's Isfahan
dailyNews.description: President Trump posted a video of a strike in Iran's central city of Isfahan, which is the home to one of three nuclear facilities attacked by the U.S. military in June 2025. CBS News' Olivia Gazis and Elizabeth Palmer report.

dailyNews.title: Iranian says regime is "ready at any cost" to stay in power as Trump renews threats
dailyNews.description: A Tehran resident told CBS News many people have given up hope that the war will help topple the regime, adding that it is "ready at any cost" to stay in power. Meanwhile, President Trump has renewed threats to strike Iran's power plants. Holly Williams reports.

dailyNews.title: Trump lashes out at UK and France, telling allies 'the U.S.A. won't be there to help you anymore'
dailyNews.description: Trump re-upped his disdain for European allies that have refused to take part in the U.S. and Israel's military operation against Iran.
